---
title: "13 Single-Cell RNA Sequencing Analysis"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)

# Global Parameters
# Quality control threshold and clustering resolution

# Data Import
# Import single-cell GSE dataset

# Data Analysis
# 1. Single-cell data quality control and low-quality cell filtering
# 2. Standardization, PCA dimensionality reduction and UMAP clustering
# 3. Cell subtype annotation
# 4. Subtype differential analysis and core gene localization
# 5. Pseudotime trajectory analysis

# Visualization
# UMAP clustering plot, trajectory plot, gene distribution plot

# Result Export
# Output single-cell annotation results and gene localization statistics

# Result Description
# Explain cell annotation standards and trajectory mechanism
